response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, hands-on senior engineer with 15+ years across web, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus recent AI-agent tooling experience. However, this is a Principal/IC6 role centered on experimentation and growth systems, and the resume shows no experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or metrics/telemetry infrastructure experience, nor evidence of leading multi-team, multi-workstream initiatives at enterprise scale. The core domain and scope gaps outweigh his solid engineering fundamentals for this specific position.
strengths: 15+ years of broad, hands-on engineering experience across many languages (TypeScript, C/C++, Java, C#, DLang) meeting the language and tenure bar
Production experience at scale, including low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Recent AI-tooling experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow infrastructure), matching the preferred AI-acceleration qualification
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth/measurement platform experience — the core of this role
Career has been senior/staff IC work at small-to-mid companies; no evidence of Principal-level, multi-workstream leadership across teams and products
Limited demonstrated data/statistical analysis depth for a role requiring metrics design, guardrails, and bias detection in experiments

key_factors.factor: Scope gap vs Principal/IC6 cross-team leadership
Strong general engineering fundamentals at scale
